channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Breaking geopolitical news from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 🛢️ Oil prices steady as markets assess Hormuz closure fallout
item.description: Oil prices remained nearly flat on Thursday as investors weighed potential supply disruptions from the Middle East conflict after Iran announced the closure of the Strait of Hormuz following US military strikes.

item.title: ⛽ Fuel runs dry in Russian-held Crimea as Ukraine strikes supply routes
item.description: Petrol stations in Russian-occupied Sevastopol have run dry after Ukraine stepped up drone attacks on supply routes, forcing authorities to delay rationed fuel distribution to residents.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Trump vows US will seize Iranian oil hub Kharg Island
item.description: President Trump said the United States would hit Iran 'very hard tonight' and threatened to eventually take control of Kharg Island, Iran's main oil export terminal, as the conflict between Washington and Tehran reignited.

item.title: 📉🌍 World Bank slashes global growth forecast to 2.5% on Iran war fallout
item.description: The World Bank cut its 2026 global growth forecast to 2.5% due to the Middle East war, warning growth could slow to just 1.3% if energy supply disruptions prove severe and financial markets face substantial stress.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇵🇭 China bans Philippines defense chief over South China Sea comments
item.description: Beijing has banned Philippines Defense Secretary Gilberto Teodoro and his family from entering China over his statements calling China's South China Sea claims a "fiction and lie" and criticizing President Xi Jinping's leadership.

item.title: 🇬🇧⚔️ UK Defense Secretary resigns over military spending dispute with Starmer
item.description: John Healey unexpectedly resigned as UK defense secretary, saying Prime Minister Keir Starmer failed to commit sufficient resources to defense at a time of "rising threats" including the Iran war and Russia's invasion of Ukraine.

item.title: 🇵🇰💰 Pakistan budget hits middle class to meet IMF targets amid Iran war pressure
item.description: Pakistan's government proposed a budget hitting the middle class and registered businesses to raise revenue and cut spending while shielding the poorest, as the Iran war and IMF requirements squeeze the economy.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine gains edge in FPV drone warfare, says commander-in-chief
item.description: Ukraine has achieved a 1.5-to-1 advantage over Russia in FPV drone production and deployment, Commander-in-Chief Oleksandr Syrsky said, marking a significant shift in the technological arms race on the battlefield.

item.title: 🇮🇳 India demands end to US attacks on ships after three sailors killed
item.description: India demanded an immediate end to US attacks on commercial shipping after three Indian sailors were killed in American strikes on vessels in the Gulf, escalating diplomatic tensions between Washington and New Delhi.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Hegseth blocks Navy and Air Force promotions over policy disputes
item.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth has blocked numerous Navy and Air Force promotions over policy disagreements, creating a backlog affecting hundreds of officers amid ongoing global military commitments.

item.title: 🏛️ ECB raises interest rates amid Iran war inflation pressures
item.description: The European Central Bank raised interest rates as inflation pressures from the Middle East conflict and energy market disruptions mount, marking a shift in monetary policy stance.

item.title: 💰 ECB rate decision: Jumping at inflation shadows
item.description: The ECB's rate hike comes as markets question whether the central bank is reacting to temporary energy price spikes from the Iran conflict rather than underlying inflation trends.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran war day 104: Tehran strikes US bases after American attacks
item.description: Iran closed the Strait of Hormuz and launched retaliatory strikes on US bases in Kuwait, Bahrain and Jordan after US military attacks, marking a major escalation on day 104 of the conflict.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ground-based drones play key role in Ukraine battlefield
item.description: New ground-based drones are transforming warfare in Ukraine, with both sides deploying unmanned ground vehicles for logistics, reconnaissance and combat roles in the ongoing conflict.

item.title: 🇹🇭 Thai court sentences two Uyghur men to death for 2015 Bangkok bombing
item.description: A Thai court sentenced two Uyghur men to death for the 2015 Bangkok shrine bombing that killed 20 people, closing a case that highlighted China's treatment of its Uyghur minority.

item.title: 🇪🇺 Italy's PM calls for single EU voice in Russia talks
item.description: Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni called for a unified European Union voice in negotiations with Russia over Ukraine, questioning the effectiveness of smaller diplomatic formats.

item.title: 🇮🇩 Indonesia economy faces pressure from rupiah decline
item.description: Indonesia's economy is facing headwinds from a weakening rupiah and stock exchange pressures, as global economic uncertainty and regional tensions weigh on Southeast Asia's largest economy.

item.title: 🇲🇲 American diplomat found dead in Myanmar
item.description: An American diplomat was found dead in Myanmar under unclear circumstances, with US and Myanmar authorities investigating the cause of death.

item.title: 🚢 Indian tanker hit off Oman in suspected third US strike this week
item.description: An Indian-crewed tanker was hit off the coast of Oman in what appears to be the third US strike this week on commercial vessels in the Gulf, raising concerns about maritime safety.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran warns Middle East truce "practically meaningless" after US strikes
item.description: Iran declared the Middle East ceasefire "practically meaningless" after the United States launched new military strikes, signaling further escalation in the regional conflict.

item.title: 🌍 Russia says Middle East tensions threaten global economy
item.description: Russia warned that escalating Middle East tensions threaten the global economy as a whole, calling for diplomatic solutions to prevent further economic disruption.

item.title: 💥 Three injured in overnight US strikes on Iran, state media reports
item.description: Three people were injured in overnight US strikes on Iran, according to Iranian state media, as the military conflict between Washington and Tehran continued to intensify.

item.title: 🇫🇷 Iran and Ukraine loom over G7 as France accommodates Trump
item.description: Wars in the Middle East and Ukraine are set to dominate next week's G7 summit, as host France crafts an agenda aimed at projecting unity and avoiding confrontation with US President Donald Trump.

item.title: 🇨🇳💭 China's Global Civilization Initiative fosters harmony in fractured world
item.description: In an era marked by geopolitical tensions and economic fragmentation, China's Global Civilization Initiative aims to foster international harmony through cultural dialogue and mutual understanding.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Canada-US bridge opening delayed amid Trump tensions
item.description: A major new bridge between the US and Canada that President Trump had previously threatened to block has been delayed due to unresolved "issues," highlighting ongoing cross-border tensions.
